SEARCH

Package cpdt.common.models

package cpdt.common.models
Provides the core domain models used throughout the Chemical Plant Digital Twin (CPDT) platform.

This package contains the shared object representations of physical entities within the system, including devices and their locations. These models define the common structure and state required by both the simulator and backend modules, serving as the foundation of the platform's domain model.

Since:
1.0
Author:
Lakshmi Sanjeev
  • Class
    Description
    Device
    Abstract base class representing a physical device within the Chemical Plant Digital Twin Platform.
    Location
    Immutable value object representing the physical location of a device within the simulated chemical plant.
